name: Haute Dog
overview: This head-to-tail dog grooming creative competition series, inspired by Jess Rona's coffee table book "Groomed," showcases canine breeds of all kinds, with each episode featuring three dog groomers facing off over two rounds. These doggy makeover wizards compete to turn the K-9s into K-10s

trailers.title: Haute Dog | Trailer | HBO Max Family
